title: schizeilema nitens
intro: Schizeilema nitens, also known as the shining maidenhair fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Schizeilema nitens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, reduce fever, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Schizeilema nitens often involve drying the leaves and roots to create a decoction or infusion that can be used to treat various health conditions.
